title: Seven Levels Deep
style: cinematic cool-blue neon tones, Blade Runner 2049 atmosphere, hard geometric light and shadow, digital expressionism

characters.name: The Signal
characters.description: translucent humanoid figure composed of cascading amber half-precision numbers, flowing robes of soft floating digits, no fixed facial features — a shifting luminous presence, warm gold light radiating from within, full-body ethereal and weightless

characters.name: The Quantizer
characters.description: tall angular figure in a minimalist silver lab coat, short platinum hair, sharp calm expression, holds a crystalline balance scale that glows faint blue, full-body precise geometric aesthetic, eyes like polished chrome

scenes.image_prompt: vast infinite data warehouse, towering columns of blue light stretching to darkness, a lone figure standing at the center bathed in amber glow, fog rolling across a black reflective floor, sense of immense scale and latent weight
scenes.video_prompt: slow pan across the warehouse columns, ambient digits drift downward like snow, figure gently pulses with inner light, camera slowly dollies toward them
scenes.narration: Before compression, there is only abundance — more than the world can hold.

scenes.image_prompt: close-up at a crystalline workbench, blue-lit instruments arranged with surgical precision, a holographic readout showing a waveform reaching its absolute maximum, hands raised to measure with the glowing scale, dramatic side-lighting casting sharp shadows
scenes.video_prompt: hands move with deliberate care along the holographic waveform, the scale tips and holds, a single number — 7 — ignites in the air above the workbench
scenes.narration: Find the peak. Everything else is measured against it.

scenes.image_prompt: the figure standing inside a compression chamber of geometric blue rings, each ring tightening inward, ambient numbers peeling away like layers of translucent skin, expression serene and surrendering, deep atmospheric depth behind
scenes.video_prompt: rings slowly contract around the figure, floating digits spiral inward and vanish, the figure dims slightly but holds its form, a quiet implosion of light
scenes.narration: To be quantized is not to be lost — it is to be known by your essential value.

scenes.image_prompt: the figure now reduced to two interleaved silhouettes sharing a single crystalline byte, low nibble and high nibble side by side in perfect mirrored symmetry, surrounded by identical paired forms stretching to the horizon in deep blue fog
scenes.video_prompt: camera pulls back slowly revealing infinite rows of packed pairs, each one pulsing faintly in unison, a vast quiet army of compressed light
scenes.narration: Two become one. Even and odd, packed together — memory, halved.

scenes.image_prompt: figure re-emerging from a dark matrix floor, slightly smaller than before but radiating a crisper colder light, standing before an enormous output grid blazing with half-precision results, triumphant low-angle composition against a cathedral of computation
scenes.video_prompt: figure rises slowly, the grid behind ignites row by row in cascading light, camera cranes upward as the full output resolves into coherent brilliance
scenes.narration: Smaller. Faster. Still true. The approximation that preserves the soul.
